daily_refresh.note: Overlap days is a proposal, not hardcoded. Final value pending operator decision.

first_run_backfill.note: Used only at new client setup or first county launch.

historical_lookup.note: Optional future operator-triggered lookup only. Not part of daily pipeline. Do not design around historical mining.

doc_type_map.reason: Per operator strict rule: AFFIDAV is the umbrella for all affidavits including heirship. Classified SUPPORTING (not PRIMARY) because most affidavits are not heirship. MEDIUM confidence. Downstream pattern matching (owner_name_patterns + legal-description scan) is required to isolate the heirship subset.

doc_type_map.label: CORRECTION
doc_type_map.lead_role: Correction instrument — may or may not be the 'correction deed' the operator wants.
doc_type_map.reason: Operator listed correction deeds as a lead IF an exact code exists. CORRECT is labeled 'CORRECTION' (correction of any instrument), not specifically 'CORRECTION DEED'. Ambiguous — operator must confirm the mapping. needs_operator_review.

doc_type_map.label: CHILD SUPPORT LN
doc_type_map.lead_role: Child support lien — a lien type, but operator rates it below tax liens / lis pendens.
doc_type_map.reason: Operator guidance: child support liens lower confidence than tax liens / lis pendens. CONTEXT_SIGNAL / LOW.

doc_type_map.label: DEED AFFIDAVIT
doc_type_map.lead_role: Deed affidavit — affidavit attached to a deed; can carry heirship/estate signal.
doc_type_map.reason: Affidavit-related code that may carry heirship or estate-transfer signal. SUPPORTING / MEDIUM — requires downstream pattern matching, not a standalone lead. See AFFIDAV strict rule.

doc_type_map.label: DECLARATION
doc_type_map.reason: Routine administrative / transactional recording; not a distress or lead signal for v1.

doc_type_map.label: DECREE
doc_type_map.lead_role: Court decree (divorce, partition, heirship, etc.) — potential forced-sale / title-change signal.
doc_type_map.reason: Operator promoted to HIGH confidence v1. Court decree connected to real property is a material title event. review_intensity MEDIUM acknowledges DECREE umbrella spans divorce, partition, heirship, misc.

doc_type_map.label: DEED
doc_type_map.reason: Operator strict rule: broad DEED must not be treated as a lead for v1. No isolated deed subtypes (quitclaim / partition) exist as separate codes, so broad DEED is skipped for v1 rather than pulled to compensate.

doc_type_map.label: DESIGNATION
doc_type_map.reason: Routine administrative / transactional recording; not a distress or lead signal for v1.

doc_type_map.label: DEED OF TRUST
doc_type_map.reason: Deed of trust — mortgage-origination instrument. Routine, not a distress signal.

doc_type_map.label: EASEMENT
doc_type_map.reason: Routine administrative / transactional recording; not a distress or lead signal for v1.

doc_type_map.label: EXTENSION
doc_type_map.reason: Routine administrative / transactional recording; not a distress or lead signal for v1.

doc_type_map.label: HOMESTEAD AFFIDAVIT
doc_type_map.lead_role: Homestead affidavit — largely administrative; only a surviving-spouse/heirship subset is of interest.
doc_type_map.reason: Affidavit-related but mostly routine homestead designation. CONTEXT_SIGNAL / LOW — only the heirship/surviving-spouse subset matters and requires pattern matching.

doc_type_map.label: HOSPITAL LIEN
doc_type_map.lead_role: Hospital lien — a lien type, but operator rates it below tax liens / lis pendens.
doc_type_map.reason: Operator selected for daily refresh v1. Hospital lien often resolves before sale. LOW confidence acknowledged. review_intensity HIGH — many hospital liens are not motivated-seller events.

doc_type_map.label: JUDGMENT
doc_type_map.lead_role: Generic judgment umbrella — only a subset abstract to a property lien.
doc_type_map.reason: Operator selected for daily refresh v1. Not every judgment is a property lien. review_intensity HIGH — downstream filtering required to isolate property-affecting judgments.

doc_type_map.label: LEASE
doc_type_map.reason: Routine administrative / transactional recording; not a distress or lead signal for v1.

doc_type_map.label: LETTERS
doc_type_map.lead_role: Letters testamentary / of administration — estate-administration signal often tied to inherited property.
doc_type_map.reason: Operator promoted to Daily Refresh Core v1 (screenshot oversight resolved). Letters testamentary or letters of administration signal estate control, heirs, and decision-makers. review_intensity MEDIUM acknowledges downstream review needed to identify which letters are tied to property opportunities.

doc_type_map.label: LEVY
doc_type_map.lead_role: Levy — enforcement/seizure action; potential distress but broad and ambiguous.
doc_type_map.reason: A levy may indicate enforcement against an owner but the code is broad. CONTEXT_SIGNAL / LOW for v1; stack-only.

doc_type_map.label: LIEN
doc_type_map.lead_role: Broad generic lien umbrella — could encompass HOA liens and other unspecified liens.
doc_type_map.reason: Operator selected for daily refresh v1. Broad LIEN umbrella; no HOA-specific code exists so LIEN is the closest proxy. LOW confidence acknowledged. review_intensity HIGH — downstream filtering required to isolate property-affecting liens.

doc_type_map.label: LIS PENDENS
doc_type_map.lead_role: Notice of pending litigation against a specific parcel — a strong clouded-title / pre-distress signal.
doc_type_map.reason: Operator high-interest lead category (lis pendens). Directly flags an owner in active litigation over the property.

doc_type_map.label: LANDLORD LIEN
doc_type_map.lead_role: Landlord lien — a lien type, but operator rates it below tax liens / lis pendens.
doc_type_map.reason: Operator selected for daily refresh v1. Landlord lien usually commercial. LOW confidence acknowledged. review_intensity HIGH.

doc_type_map.reason: Operator high-interest lead category (mechanics liens).

doc_type_map.label: MEMORANDUM
doc_type_map.reason: Operator selected for daily refresh v1. Broad MEMORANDUM umbrella (memo of lease, memo of trust, memo of contract). LOW confidence acknowledged. review_intensity HIGH — downstream pattern matching on document text required to identify motivated-seller signals.
